t2a.caption: Bright and catchy K-pop production with punchy synths, tight rhythmic hooks, and an infectious energy that refuses to let you sit still.
t2a.lyrics:
[intro][verse]
Radio dot bot 
makes music on your PC
radio dot bot 
It's cost is next to free
radio dot bot
no cloud or subscriptions
radio dot bot
find it on steam

[chorus]
raidio dot bot...
raidio dot bot play a song for me.
yeah yeah yeah 
raidio dot bot....

[verse]
Radio dot bot 
makes music on your PC
radio dot bot
find it on steam

[outro]
